title: Smoky Halouba Tacos
description: A flavorful Mexican-inspired dish featuring smoky halouba, crispy paprika, and a hint of spice.
instructions: 1. Preheat a dry skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Cut the halouba into small pieces and add to the skillet.
3. Cook the halouba for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until caramelized.
4. Sprinkle the cumin, chili powder, salt, and black pepper over the halouba and stir to combine.
5. Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble the tacos by spooning the halouba mixture onto a tortilla and topping with sliced avocado and a dollop of sour cream.
7. Sprinkle smoked paprika over the top of each taco for added flavor.
